name: Creme De Menthe Cheesecake Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 package chocolate wafers, (9 ounce) crushed (1 3/4 cups)
4 ounces semi-sweet chocolate, chopped (1/2 cup sour cream)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350.
2. In a medium bowl, combine crust ingredients; mix well. Press into the bottom of an ungreased 13 x 9 inch pan. Freeze while preparing filling.
3. In a large bowl, beat all filling ingredients until smooth. Pour over the crust and bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool.
4. Melt chocolate in a double boiler. Let cool for 5 minutes; beat in sour cream. Spread over warm cheesecake. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until firm.
20 servings. Calories/Fat
